headline: Why SentinelOne (S) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of cybersecurity AI platform provider SentinelOne (NYSE:S) jumped 2.4% in the afternoon session after investors continued to buy the dip despite renewed geopolitical jitters as the U.S.-Iran ceasefire came under doubt following the seizure of the Iranian vessel Touska.

headline: ServiceNow Expands Into OT And IoT With Armis And AI Manufacturing
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) has closed its US$7.75b cash acquisition of cyber asset intelligence company Armis. The deal extends ServiceNow’s reach into OT, IoT, and connected medical and industrial devices with agentless asset discovery and classification capabilities. At the same time, ServiceNow has introduced AI native manufacturing platform solutions aimed at unifying workflows such as quality, warranty, and shop floor operations. For investors following NYSE:NOW, these moves sit at the...
